## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the workflow this feature would improve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like the feature to work. Include API signatures, configuration options, or usage examples if applicable.

```csharp
// Example of how the feature might be used
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that help explain the request.

## Checklist

Before submitting, please review:

- [ ] I have checked the [future enhancements](https://github.com/FactFoundry/blazor-diagram-exporter/blob/main/docs/future-enhancements.md) page to see if this is already planned
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to confirm this has not already been requested
